prompt: Map the real project roots, startup commands, and reusable API clients into a durable navigation document.

Tell me where authentication is owned and which contract the desktop client uses, without judging the current diff.
Create a compact repository map first, then hand the confirmed boundaries to a planning step; do not edit product code.
Turn this approved checkout redesign into executable tasks with dependencies, owners, reject gates, and validation commands.
Plan the SQLite migration work for next sprint; do not investigate the current production failure or modify files.
Split this cross-repository requirement into independently verifiable implementation tasks and identify blocked decisions.
I know what needs to change but need the safest sequence, task boundaries, and rollback checks before anyone codes.
Produce the implementation plan now and leave source changes for a later execution pass.
This endpoint became slow yesterday; reproduce it, isolate variables, and confirm the cause before changing code.
The build fails only on a clean machine with a missing private package. Find the exact cause and regression seam.
Why does the submit button intermittently fail across frontend, network, and backend layers? Do not patch it yet.
Reproduce the address-in-use startup failure and prove which process and configuration create the conflict.
Memory keeps growing after repeated imports. Measure the symptom and test competing explanations before proposing a fix.
Find the root cause, then hand the confirmed remediation seam to the appropriate coding workflow.
Review every local change before commit, separate unrelated work, and tell me whether the worktree is ready.
Inspect this fixed commit range and return severity-ranked actionable findings without editing anything.
Check this release candidate across frontend, Rust, security, tests, and docs, but keep the review read-only.
Review the staged and unstaged hunks, identify mixed ownership, and suggest exact commit groups.
Tell me whether these changes are safe to merge; resolve the exact comparison basis before drawing conclusions.
Perform one consolidated read-only review and call domain specialists only for bounded surfaces that need them.
Stage only the approved files, create one local commit, and show me the staged diff before committing.
Push the current reviewed branch and verify the remote ref matches the local commit.
Squash the reviewed temporary branch into main, push it, then delete only that absorbed branch.
Commit the two authorized paths but preserve every other dirty file in the worktree.
Synchronize this branch with its remote after checking whether it is ahead, behind, or diverged.
After the accepted review, stage the agreed scope, commit it, push the branch, and provide ref evidence.
Implement the Rust service change, preserve the public API, add focused tests, and run the repository gates.
Fix the confirmed Tokio cancellation bug at the identified ownership seam; do not commit the result.
Port this small library function to idiomatic Rust while preserving behavior and FFI error contracts.
Apply the confirmed SQLite fix in Rust, validate the migration and query behavior, then stop before Git staging.
Build the responsive React form from the approved design using existing components and API contracts.
Fix the confirmed modal overflow and focus behavior in the frontend; leave Git untouched.
Refactor these Vue pages to reuse the existing table primitive without changing state or request contracts.
Implement the dashboard change, run browser-facing checks where available, and stop before staging or commit.
Audit this Rust workspace for ownership, cancellation, and SQLite risks and return evidence-ranked findings only.
Profile the selected Rust memory path and assess the measurement design without applying optimizations.
Inspect only the unsafe FFI boundary, ownership invariants, and relevant validation gaps in this crate.
Assess the Tokio lifecycle design across this known Rust surface; do not coordinate a whole release review.
Audit this frontend architecture for duplicated primitives, state ownership, accessibility, and performance without editing code.
Inspect only the Vue Options API fidelity and component boundaries for this selected feature.
Assess the Tauri frontend adapter, transport DTO usage, and UI ownership as a bounded read-only audit.
Evaluate the known dashboard's layout and accessibility contracts, but do not review unrelated repository changes.

Inspect the selected upload flow for path traversal, content validation, secret exposure, and permission gaps.
Perform a bounded security assessment of this dependency and configuration change; do not take over release review.
Check the known session-management surface for CSRF, cookie, and privilege-boundary problems only.

Operate this Tauri client through semantic controls, verify the runtime source, and clean up disposable test state.

Use ChatGPT now for two independent review rounds, then verify every finding locally before any fix.
